text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: F-Fuji! It's your birthday today, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, you remembered? Why, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So um, tonight, if it's all right with you, 
we were thinking of having a ——

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Happy, happy birthdaaay! 
La la, dear Fuuujiii♪

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: S-Spe, not yet! We're supposed to sing after we invite her to the party and get the okay!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahh! O-Oh no, now I've done it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Should I take that to mean…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wh-What do we do, Suzuka? 
I messed up the fresh bob thing!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
C-Calm down, Spe. 
And I think you mean "flash mob".

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha, thank you! You planned a special 
surprise just for me, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I should've seen it coming, but you caught 
me unawares. It seems I have plenty of room 
to grow yet.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now then, my dear ponies. Will you gift me 
the rest of your surprise?
